payload.answer: The input is an article URL reference, but the source content could not be fetched due to a 404 network error. Source boundaries are limited to the user-provided URL and stated purpose; article contents are unavailable.

details: Classified source type as article URL reference.

repair_options: Retry fetching the URL later if the source becomes available.
